source_note: Use with layoff-defense/references/legal-map.md. Negotiation wording must be verified against case facts, local practice, and any signed documents before sending.
global_safety_rules: Do not threaten, insult, harass, or imply unlawful retaliation.
Do not fabricate facts, fake evidence, alter screenshots, or backdate documents.
Do not copy company secrets, source code, customer lists, or unrelated personal data.
State complaint, arbitration, or enforcement paths as lawful options, not intimidation.
Separate confirmed facts from requests for clarification.

request_written_terms.purpose: Ask HR to provide the proposal, reason, amount, payment date, certificate wording, and agreement draft in writing.

counteroffer_amount_basis.purpose: Anchor counteroffer to service years, 12-month wage basis, statutory items, and itemized unpaid amounts.

rights_reservation.purpose: Preserve rights while negotiations continue, without making unsupported accusations.

factual_refusal_to_resign.purpose: Refuse a personal-reason resignation form when the worker does not voluntarily resign.

employer_breach_record_request.purpose: Ask the employer to confirm wage, social insurance, salary cut, transfer, lockout, or other breach facts in writing.

request_written_reason.purpose: Request the exact written termination reason, basis, date, union procedure, and certificate wording.

request_economic_layoff_report_package.purpose: Request the economic-layoff reason, 30-day explanation and opinion records, labor-authority report proof, final layoff plan, compensation basis, and Guangzhou HRSS written report package when the case is in Guangzhou.

request_rehire_priority_and_replacement_.purpose: Ask the employer to confirm whether it is recruiting, outsourcing, dispatching, or otherwise replacing substantially similar roles within six months after an economic layoff, and to notify the laid-off worker of same-condition rehire priority where applicable.

work_availability.purpose: State the worker remains available to work or hand over lawfully when termination status is unclear.

itemized_payment_request.purpose: Request itemized wages, bonuses, reimbursements, annual leave, economic compensation, and payment deadline.

statutory_path_notice.purpose: State that unresolved wage or separation disputes may be handled by complaint, mediation, arbitration, or litigation paths.

payment_or_release_request.purpose: Ask employer to pay non-compete compensation or confirm release from non-compete obligations.

scope_limit_question.purpose: Ask for the basis of personnel scope, confidential matter, territory, term, competing business, and penalty.

payment_default_notice.purpose: Record missed payment under an agreement and request immediate payment with deadline and bank details.

evidence_preservation.purpose: Remind the worker to preserve full-context lawful records before and after sending messages.

lawyer_check.purpose: Flag high-risk legal review before signing or sending.

separation_offer_counter.use_when: Employer proposes mutual termination, settlement, or low compensation before signing.
separation_offer_counter.objective: Get written proposal, itemized amount, payment deadline, certificate wording, and preserve ability to counteroffer.
forbidden_phrases: 我保证不再主张任何权利
escalation_triggers: Employer refuses written terms.
Agreement contains broad waiver or personal-reason resignation wording.
Payment date or amount remains unclear.

forced_resignation_response.use_when: Employer pressures worker to sign personal-reason resignation or OA resignation while dispute facts exist.
forced_resignation_response.objective: Avoid voluntary resignation admission and request written factual basis.
escalation_triggers: Employer blocks work access or withholds wages.
Employer demands same-day resignation.
Limitation or evidence loss risk is high.

termination_reason_request.use_when: Employer orally dismisses, locks account, or gives unclear termination reason.
termination_reason_request.objective: Get exact written reason, preserve work availability, and avoid accepting unclear termination.
escalation_triggers: Employer refuses written reason.
Employer changes termination ground.
Worker wants reinstatement or 2N compensation.

economic_layoff_report_request.use_when: Employer claims economic layoff, headcount optimization, business-method adjustment, technology or AI transformation, or Guangzhou local layoff filing/reporting.
economic_layoff_report_request.objective: Ask for the statutory layoff basis, employee-opinion process, HRSS report materials, priority-retention review, and payment basis while avoiding threats or unlawful evidence collection.
forbidden_phrases: 你们不给材料我就曝光
我可以去拿公司内部资料
escalation_triggers: Employer refuses to identify the statutory layoff reason.
Employer has no 30-day explanation or opinion record.
Guangzhou HRSS written report package or final publication is missing.
Priority-retention or protected-status screening is absent.
Same or substantially similar roles are recruited, outsourced, or dispatched within six months without rehire notice.

unpaid_wage_demand.use_when: Wages, bonus, reimbursement, annual leave, or economic compensation are unpaid or underpaid.
unpaid_wage_demand.objective: Request itemized calculation and payment while preserving complaint and arbitration path.
escalation_triggers: Employer misses payment deadline.
Employer refuses itemized calculation.
Arbitration limitation may be near.

non_compete_payment_or_release.use_when: Employer asserts non-compete, stops paying compensation, or demands broad restriction after departure.
non_compete_payment_or_release.objective: Clarify scope, request compensation, or request written release from restriction.
escalation_triggers: Employer has not paid non-compete compensation for three months.
Scope, territory, term, or penalty is excessive.
Worker may join a competitor and needs lawyer_check.

settlement_payment_default.use_when: Employer signed a settlement or separation agreement but misses payment or refuses certificate transfer duties.
settlement_payment_default.objective: Record default, request immediate performance, and prepare enforcement/arbitration materials.
forbidden_phrases: 我接受延期但没有书面确认
escalation_triggers: Payment remains unpaid after written deadline.
Employer refuses certificate or transfer paperwork.
Agreement validity or enforceability is disputed.
